nasb.text: But the fields of the city and its villages they gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh as his possession.

esv.text: But the fields of the city and its villages had been given to Caleb the son of Jephunneh as his possession.

cnv.text: 屬於那城的田地和村莊，他們卻給了耶孚尼的兒子迦勒作產業。

ccb.text: 而城周围的田地和乡村已经分给耶孚尼的儿子迦勒作产业。
